reviews.comment:
Siempre cargo en esta estacion de servicios ypf. Aceptan varias tarjetas de credito. Tiene un modesto bar como para tomar un rico cafe y leer el diario. Posee dos maquina para inflar las ruedas. Tiene maquina de agua caliente para el mate. Tiene buen servicio y gente con buena predisposicion.

(Translated by Google)
I always fill up at this YPF gas station. They accept several credit cards. It has a small bar where you can enjoy a nice coffee and read the newspaper. There are two tire inflators. They also have a hot water dispenser for mate. The service is good and the staff is friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12305613765678893423/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURvcDhibHhBRRAB
